title: Luffy Laughs at the Castle
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on luffy laughs at the castle, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Luffy Laughs at the Castle. Back in the present, Wapol attacks Drum Castle and tries to turn Hiriluk’s symbol into another selfish possession. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Article 1 in the Constitution of Drum Kingdom: "Those who defy the King's will are to be executed!"

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: This is the foundation of this country!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Because I am the state and the state is I!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This castle and everything on this island is mine and mine alone...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So there's no way in hell I'm going to stand by while some quack doctor's flag is hanging on top of my castle!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It's defiling my entire Royal Abode!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We should climb up the mountain! Well, usopp? Mr. Bushido?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We can't just stand by and wait here! I mean, there was an avalanche just a moment ago,

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Wapol's now chasing after them, and Dr. Kureha may not even have returned to the castle yet...!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: That's not to mention Nami's fever is-

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: And on top of that, you're worried about dalton and alabasta...?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Calm down, VIVI.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You're Burdening yourself with way too many problems!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nami's got Luffy and Sanji with her!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: They'll manage somehow.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: I know those three will be just fine,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Because I trust them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's right...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's important to believe in them as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Thanks, usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O-O

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You say that but you're just scared 'bout climbing that mountain, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: No, duh! there's like, abominable snowmen and man-eating rabbits the size of bears up there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But it's still fine! Those guys can handle it somehow!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Just say that from the start next time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And so what if I'm scared!? You got a problem with that!?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Dalton, you're being too reckless!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Move it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If I don't fight now, then when!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But Dalton!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah, mister!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Anybody mind filling me in on who that is anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: From the tragic destruction of our country, we miraculously regained our freedom!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: If we let this chance slip by. This country will continue to rot away for eternity!

summary: This part highlights luffy laughs at the castle and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
